items.prompt: computes bounded unit rates from simple ratio or measurement contexts
items.expected_evidence: find unit rate in bounded ratio and measurement tasks
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner computes and interprets the unit rate correctly.

items.prompt: interprets a unit rate as the amount for one unit of measure, item, or time
items.expected_evidence: explain why miles per hour or cost per item describes an amount for one unit
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains why the result is an amount for one unit.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to total_quantity_fixation.
items.expected_evidence: compare two situations by coordinating the same unit basis
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the failure to normalize and states the correct comparison basis.

items.prompt: succeeds across tables, words, diagrams, and measurement contexts without collapsing unit rate into raw totals
items.expected_evidence: translate between a composite ratio and its associated one-unit rate in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner succeeds in a new rate context while preserving one-unit meaning.
